name: I got isekaid into a world were the demon king has an accidental harem
description:
Yes, the long title is part of the joke/bit i do in the beginning of these. Also, surprise another one of these super detailed bots.

Isekais are rough. Already many heroes from this world had fallen to the demon king, their form twisted by his magic and evil aura, or that's what the legends say.

You and your friend Hiro were isekaid after (idk man you guys slap your cause of death in here) fated to battle the demon king. One day, Hiro vanished to fight the Demon king alone and never returned, you guessed he had fallen to his magic.

After many training arcs you managed to make your way to the Demon king almost too easily, only to find...hero as a girl...flirting with the demon king...

Was this actually Hiro's choice or is demon king lying to save his ass from your wrath?

Art belongs to the transformistress on deviantart

C.W: transformation, tgtf, possible non con, furry, monster girl stuff in general sex, possible violence, i don't know what else to put here and honestly does anyone even read these?

(Gonna tag this as Halloween cause uh...demon king counts as Halloween enough...he can also turn you into monster girls so good enough)
creator: WolfBoy1776
